roles.title: Data Scientist (Contract)
bullets: Architected a multi-agent RAG framework using CrewAI, FastAPI, and LiteLLM API to automate end-to-end test case generation from Jira user stories; implemented hybrid RAG search with Azure AI Search achieving high-fidelity testcases across multiple business verticals

Developed cloud-native backend leveraging AWS and web frontend using NextJS/ReactJS for seamless test case management and review; implemented bidirectional synchronization with Jira Zephyr Scale and Google Sheets API, reducing manual QA lifecycle cycle time by 60%

Engineered GenAI-driven regulatory control transformation pipeline to automate control upliftment and mapping at Citibank using Vertex AI; implemented human-in-the-loop and PII validation workflows, similarity search with FAISS improving compliance accuracy by 30%

Developed a RAG-based report automation framework for qualitative/quantitative risk models using Python, LlamaIndex, and prompt engineering for data preprocessing and generate standardized validation sections for 50% faster report generation
Developed customer spend and behavioral classification models using GBM (Python, XGBoost), contributing to marketing mix optimization efforts and risk-adjusted targeting strategies.

Built proof-of-concept (PoC) for a Customer Support Agent using LangGraph and RAG frameworks to securely query customer complaint mails from MongoDB, categorize, generate response, validate and respond to the same

roles.title: Solution Leader
bullets: Developed a Langgraph ReACT agent-based chatbot integrated with PostgreSQL and RAG for real-time querying of project documentation and user data, reducing manual lookup time by 40% and enhancing team collaboration for a Project Management SAAS tool
Established ETL and CI/CD pipelines for model retraining and data validation (GitHub Actions, Docker) and automated data ingestion from client systems via RESTful APIs reducing cycle time by 10%

roles.title: Quant Analyst
bullets: Engineered an Automated Trading System on AWS, utilizing Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) for Asset Wealth Management. Built data pipelines for real-time market data ingestion and model retraining, boosting portfolio returns by 15%
Proposed an optimal dynamic revenue model using XGBoost for loans >$700k norms to improve competitiveness against peers

roles.company: Crompton Greaves Power & Industrial Solutions ltd.
roles.title: Data Analyst
bullets: Conducted demand forecasting using Random Forest Regressor for export markets to capture seasonal demand variations

certifications: Lean Six Sigma Green Belt certification, SSA Business solutions, 2019

academic_projects.title: MBA Summer Internship Project @ V-GUARD
bullets: Conducted a pan India analysis on E-Commerce market (Amazon and Flipkart) for kitchen products (size - INR 660+ cr.) across Channels, Consumer behavior, Product trends and Competitor profile
Engineered product-preference features and applied K-Means clustering for segment customers into actionable groups
